name: claude-browser-bridge
description: MCP bridge between Claude Code and your browser via WebSocket extension and shared daemon.

telemetry_enabled.title: Usage telemetry
telemetry_enabled.description: Send anonymous tool invocation events (tool name + error messages) to telemetry.softwaresoftware.dev to help improve the plugin. No page content, URLs, form values, or personal data is sent. Set to false to disable.

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Verbosity of stderr logs from the MCP client and daemon. debug = everything (including reconnect attempts, per-session IPC lifecycle). info = normal startup/connection events (default). warn = only problems. error = only failures. silent = nothing.
